title: HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Full Stack Developer in Navi Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd:
HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe Consulting Pvt Ltd!
